title: IATF ẽtɛgnetã
summary: Sebr ning b sẽn boond tɩ International Accessibility Task Force wã.
problem: IATF ra rata zãma roog sẽn yaa kãn-kãe sẽn na n wilg modɛlã, n sõd tʋʋm-teedo, la a wilg neb nins sẽn sõngd-a wã b sẽn segd n maan bũmb ning sẽn pʋgdã.
why: Zĩ-kãng yaa IATF zãma wã taoor kʋɩlengã. B me-a-la wa tʋʋm-bil sẽn yaa bilf sẽn na yɩl tɩ b tõe n karem-a nana-nana, n lebg-a, la b kell n tall-a zĩig ning b sẽn tõe n yã-a wã.
scopeIn: Sebr ning sẽn wilgd IATF modɛlã
IATF tʋʋm-noy nins b sẽn sak n deegã, b sẽn tʋmdẽ wã, la b sẽn bĩng-b b sɛbã pʋgẽ wã, ne b sẽn be zĩig ninga, b yel-gɛtbã, b bĩisrã la b makrã
Bãngr-gomd ning b sẽn lebg ne ãngilindã, la b sẽn tõe n lebg-a to-to
Sẽn kẽed ne Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
scopeOut: Kẽer sẽn yaa ninsabls tẽnsa, kɩbay bɩ sẽn kẽed ne log-n-migs wɛɛngẽ
Gʋls-no-rɩkdgã sẽn be tʋʋm-noy fãa bĩngr zĩigẽ wã
Gʋls-y-yã wakat-tɩrga, sẽn be Discord pʋgẽ

title: IATF selfie wã
summary: Yaa IATF pipi makr a ye, b sẽn bĩng-a a sẽn ta zĩig ning b sẽn da segd n yals n bas-a wã poore.
problem: Sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b tõog n paam tʋʋm-noor sẽn kẽed ne b sẽn tõe n paam b sẽn datã, b na n tigma ne IATF t'a ges b sẽn na n maan to-to.
why: Sebã b sẽn bĩng n be wã yaa zãma wã fãa yĩnga, baa ne tʋʋm-noy nins b sẽn da maandã sẽn yalsã.
scopeIn: Bãngr-gomd ning b sẽn tũnug ne n na n sõng nebã tɩ b bãng b sẽn segd n maan to-to wã
scopeOut: B sẽn sagend tɩ b rɩk-a n maan bũmbu

title: IATF botã
summary: A IATF community bot, a sẽn wa n ta zĩig ning a sẽn na n yalsã.
problem: Automatisã sẽn kẽed ne IATF siglgã soayã.
why: Sebã b sẽn bĩng n be wã yaa zãma wã fãa yĩnga, baa ne tʋʋm-noy nins b sẽn da maandã sẽn yalsã.
scopeIn: Yãk-y n tool-y ned kam fãa t'a bãng a sẽn segd n maan to-to
scopeOut: B sẽn sagend tɩ b rɩk-a n maan bũmbu
